questions.question: What Blake Edwards' movie series, revived in the 70s, follows the madcap antics of Inspector Clouseau and his nemesis Chief Inspector Dreyfus?
In the 80s, pagers displayed a phone number for the recipient to call back, usually on a pay phone. What was the nickname given to pagers?
What popular singer/songwriter wrote "Annie's Song" for his then-wife that became a wedding standard in the 70s?
What famous ballet dancer defected from the Soviet Union in 1974, eventually starring in the movie White Nights with Gregory Hines in 1985?
What medicinal phrase was told to someone who needed to calm down?
